properties.AddressInfo.Title: Mansavi SuperCharge Point
properties.AddressInfo.AccessComments: Mansavi Supercharge Point (MSCP) is at A-14, Block B, Ansal Golf Links-1, Sector Omega-1, Greater Noida, UP 201310, offering unmatched accessibility:  * **200 m** from the Noida–Greater Noida Expressway * **250 m** from Knowledge Park II (KP 2) Metro Station * **At Zero Point**, where the Yamuna Expressway heads toward Agra * **700 m** from India Expo Mart (major event hub)  Whether you’re commuting, traveling between cities, or attending an event, MSCP is the perfect fast-charging stop—conveniently located where connectivity meets the city’s major arteries.
